app.title: ZunaroDo

history.empty: No entries yet - ask the assistant something.

modules.title: Enable/disable modules
modules.hint: Disabled modules expose neither capabilities nor dashboard events. Their data stays in the database.
settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Values are persisted in the DB. Secret fields (API keys, passwords) are read from environment variables only - they are NOT stored in the DB.
settings.saved: {count} values saved. Restart required for some fields.
settings.sync_pro_required: Multi-device sync requires a Pro license.
license.title: License
license.hint: Pro unlocks all modules, AI, and multi-device sync. Paste your purchase token or start a trial.
stats.title: Statistics & trends
data.title: Manage data
data.import_warning: Imported entries get new IDs - no 1:1 round-trip.
data.delete_warning: Permanently deletes all contracts, appointments, contacts, notes and settings from this device.
data.delete_confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed from this device.
data.delete_done: All data deleted. Please restart the app.
calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.empty: No events in the next {days} days.
social.title: Social
onboarding.title: Welcome to ZunaroDo
onboarding.intro: Your database is empty. How would you like to start?
onboarding.option_demo: Start with sample data (2 contracts, 3 family members, a few events)
inbox.title: Analyze incoming mail
chat.greeting: Hello! The dashboard shows your upcoming events. Ask me anything here.
proposal_editor.title: Edit proposal
proposal_editor.target_unavailable: Target capability '{target}' is unavailable. Check that the corresponding module is enabled.
form.name: Name
form.title: Title
finance.recent_empty: No expenses in the last {days} days.
cap.calendar.delete_event.desc: Moves an appointment to the trash. Restore via calendar.restore_event; permanent only via calendar.purge_event.
cap.calendar.export_ical.desc: Exports all appointments as an iCalendar file (.ics) that can be imported into any common calendar.
cap.calendar.import_ical.desc: Reads an iCalendar file (.ics) and creates the contained appointments. Existing appointments are NOT changed - new entries are created.
cap.calendar.upcoming.desc: Returns upcoming appointments within a horizon.
cap.contracts.delete.desc: Moves a contract to the trash (soft delete). Restorable with 'contracts.restore'; permanent only via 'contracts.purge'.
cap.contracts.generate_cancellation.desc: Creates a timely cancellation letter for a contract - as a printable PDF and/or email draft.
cap.contracts.list.desc: Lists all active contracts with costs. Optionally filterable by category.
cap.contracts.list_deleted.desc: Lists the contracts currently in the trash.
cap.contracts.purge.desc: Permanent deletion of a contract (no restore possible).
cap.contracts.report_price_change.desc: Records a price change for a contract and stores it in the price history.
cap.contracts.set_owner.desc: Assigns a contract to a person (or clears the assignment with owner_id=0).
cap.contracts.upcoming_deadlines.desc: Returns upcoming cancellation deadlines, optionally limited to the next N days.
cap.day.log_energy.desc: Rates today (1=drained ... 5=great) and creates an entry or replaces today's.
cap.day.recent_entries.desc: Lists the most recent daily entries.
cap.day.recommendation.desc: Provides a simple recommendation based on recent entries.
cap.family.add_member.desc: Adds a household member, optionally with a birthday (the date is automatically added to the calendar module).
cap.family.add_order.desc: Creates a one-off task assigned to a specific person (with a due date).
cap.family.add_task.desc: Creates a recurring household task with rotation between members.
cap.family.bulk_complete_overdue.desc: Checks off all tasks due today or earlier. The rotation advances by one person for each task.
cap.family.complete_order.desc: Marks a one-off task as done.
cap.family.complete_task.desc: Checks off a task: the rotation advances to the next person and the task is rescheduled.
cap.family.delete_member.desc: Moves a household member to the trash (soft delete). Restore via family.restore_member, permanent only via family.purge_member.
cap.family.members.desc: Lists the household members. Also usable by other modules to assign entries to a person.
cap.family.orders.desc: Lists the one-off tasks with assignee and status, sorted by priority. Optionally filterable by category.
cap.family.purge_member.desc: Deletes a member permanently. References are decoupled via ON DELETE SET NULL.
cap.family.shopping_add.desc: Adds an entry to the shared shopping list.
cap.family.shopping_list.desc: Lists the entries on the shopping list.
cap.family.shopping_mark.desc: Checks off an entry on the shopping list (or resets it).
cap.family.tasks.desc: Lists the household tasks with current assignee and next due date.
cap.finance.delete_expense.desc: Moves an expense to the trash. Restore via 'finance.restore_expense'; permanent only via 'finance.purge_expense'.
cap.finance.expenses_by_person.desc: Aggregates expenses per household member (resolves owner_id via family.members).
cap.finance.list_expenses.desc: Lists all recorded expenses with a total.
cap.finance.monthly_overview.desc: Calculates the monthly burden: one-off expenses this month combined with the recurring contract costs from module A.
cap.finance.price_memory.desc: Lists the stored prices of recurring products.
cap.finance.remember_price.desc: Remembers the current price of a product (price memory for recurring purchases).
cap.finance.scan_receipt.desc: Reads a receipt via OCR and extracts items and total (requires pytesseract + Tesseract; without installation a clear notice is shown).
cap.inbox.accept_proposal.desc: Accepts a proposal: calls the target capability, the responsible module records the data.
cap.inbox.analyze_mail.desc: Analyzes the text of an incoming email and creates matching proposals in the inbox.
cap.inbox.bulk_delete_archived.desc: Permanently deletes all proposals that have already been accepted or rejected from the inbox.
cap.inbox.bulk_reject_open.desc: Rejects all open proposals at once. Returns the number of rejected proposals.
cap.inbox.fetch_imap.desc: Fetches unread mails via IMAP and analyzes them. Needs ALLTAGSHELFER_IMAP_HOST/USER/PASS in the environment; without them it is skipped.
cap.inbox.import_eml.desc: Reads an .eml file and analyzes it.
cap.inbox.proposals.desc: Lists the open proposals in the inbox.
cap.inbox.reject_proposal.desc: Rejects a proposal (it will not be accepted).
cap.inbox.update_proposal.desc: Edits an open proposal before it is accepted. Only affects proposals with status 'open'.
cap.notes.add.desc: Creates a new note. Optionally pinned to an entity (entity_type, entity_id).
cap.notes.add_attachment.desc: Additionally pins a note to another entity (n:m). The primary link via notes.attach remains untouched.
cap.notes.attach.desc: Pins a note to an entity (or clears it with entity_type=null).
cap.notes.cleanup_for_entity.desc: Deletes all notes pinned to the given entity. Called internally by the delete capabilities of other modules.
cap.notes.list.desc: Lists notes. Optionally filtered by entity.
cap.notes.list_attachments.desc: Lists all attachments of a note.
cap.notes.update.desc: Updates the title and/or content of a note.
cap.social.add_contact.desc: Creates a contact for social care.
cap.social.contacts.desc: Lists all contacts with the days remaining until the next check-in. Optionally filterable by relationship (category).
cap.social.delete_contact.desc: Moves a contact to the trash. Restore via social.restore_contact; permanent only via social.purge_contact.
cap.social.draft_message.desc: Suggests a short message for a contact (offline template; in API mode the LLM generates a more personal one).
cap.social.export_vcard.desc: Exports all contacts as a vCard file (.vcf), importable into any common address book.
cap.social.import_vcard.desc: Reads a vCard file (.vcf) and creates the contained contacts. Existing contacts remain unchanged - new entries are created.
cap.social.mark_contacted.desc: Marks a contact as just contacted (sets last_contacted = today).
cap.stats.contracts_overview.desc: Provides an overview of the number of active contracts, the monthly total and the 3 most expensive items.
cap.stats.expenses_per_category.desc: Aggregates expenses per category (default: current year).
cap.stats.expenses_per_month.desc: Sums expenses per month for the last N months (default 12) including the current month.
cap.stats.export_yearly_pdf.desc: Creates a printable annual PDF report with expense total, top categories and contract overview.
cap.stats.yearly_summary.desc: Overall view for a year: total of all expenses, top categories, monthly average.
cap.system.agenda.desc: Groups the upcoming deadlines of all modules by calendar day. Default: the coming 7 days (week view). Overdue entries are returned separately.
cap.system.search.desc: Searches across contracts, expenses, appointments, household members, contacts and proposals. Input is a keyword - hits are returned in a unified form. Optionally filterable by period, status and category.
